FERTILIZERS.fertilizer_applic_notes: N was broadcast to soil in two equal splits, at the time of sowing and 30 days after sowing. The phosphatic and potassic fertilizers were basally applied at the time of land preparation for wheat crop by broadcasting and mixed manually with top 7.5 cm soil
